body:
This pull request changes the compat entry for the `Distributions` package from `v0.24.14 - v0.25.0` to `v0.24.14 - v0.25.0, 0.25`.
This keeps the compat entries for earlier versions.



Note: I have not tested your package with this new compat entry.
It is your responsibility to make sure that your package tests pass before you merge this pull request.
title: CompatHelper: bump compat for Distributions to 0.25, (keep existing compat)

body: This PR cleans up some unused calls and inputs in the Unscented Kalman constructor. Behavior is unchanged, except for the call to `Unscented`, which now has one argument less.
title: Remove unnecessary calls and inputs in UKI.

body: Let's use the formatting that makes other CliMA packages look so nice.
title: The great formatting.
